directive.title: RFQ dashboard with live data integration

auditor.summary: The generated code provides a solid foundation with proper TypeScript types, parameterized queries (except for the critical ORDER BY vulnerability), and API route structure. However, it fails to deliver the majority of the required UI components (table, filters, search, modal, stats bar, loading/empty/error states) and contains a critical SQL injection vulnerability in the ORDER BY clause. The build is also broken due to missing @neondatabase/serverless package. The code achieves approximately 35% of the specification requirements. Major issues include: (1) CRITICAL SQL injection in ORDER BY clause, (2) Missing all UI components, (3) Missing required package dependency, (4) Floating point arithmetic on monetary values, (5) Audit logging not persisted to database. The code cannot be shipped in its current state.

top_issues.description: SQL injection vulnerability in ORDER BY clause. String interpolation used: `ORDER BY ${sort_by} ${sort_dir.toUpperCase()}`. This bypasses the whitelist validation in rfq-params.ts because the validation only runs in the API route, not in the query function itself.

Missing @neondatabase/serverless package in package.json dependencies. The code imports from '@neondatabase/serverless' but this package is not listed in the installed packages. This will cause build failure.
BUILDABILITY violation: The generated code imports from '@neondatabase/serverless' which is not in the installed packages list. This is a CRITICAL issue that prevents compilation.
